checked_conclusion: The promoted-collar package is not a final Hamilton breaker on the checked resonant moduli. The remaining obstruction is already visible on the exact induced map F_m on H_m, and in the checked moduli every cycle of F_m meets the base subset B_m.
priority_update: The next closable theorem is the base-section reduction/no-go theorem for the promoted-collar family. The next positive repair target should then be phrased as a new surgery that changes the induced base permutation on B_m.
